title: Marvelous Custom Items
description: Replaces weapon/tool/item models when renamed in an anvil. Inspired by Marvel, and the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU). Works with OptiFine, or CIT Resewn + Custom Entity Models mod.
body:
# Marvelous Custom Items

A resource pack brought to **You** by ***Szombie***, inspired by **Marvel**.

### (Requires: OptiFine 1.13+)

## You can:

- Showcase the resource pack in any format if you credit me.
- Share the resource pack with the Modrinth link.
- Use the resource pack on any server.
- Modify the resource pack for private use only! 

## You can't:

- Claim the resource pack as your own.
- Modify the resource pack for public use.
- Reupload any contents of the resource pack to anywhere.
- Showcase or share the resource pack without properly crediting the author.

### WARNING: If you disregard ANY of the above statements, measures will be taken to prevent any kind of theft! Thank you for understanding.
 
## About & Credits

This resource pack aims to add most of the iconic weapons from the Marvel universe to Minecraft. There are two editions of both versions: Effect and No Effect. The No Effect versions remove the all effects on the models (shine, electricity, etc), improving your overall performance by a little. The resource pack only provides cosmetic benefits, it doesn't include anything else! In the Contents section below, you can find out the specifics.

## Contents & renames up to V3:

- **Captain America's Shield:** Rename a *shield* to a name including ***"cap"***
- **Mjolnir:** Rename a *diamond / netherite sword / axe* to a name including ***"mjolnir"***
- **Stormbreaker:** Rename a *diamond / netherite sword / axe* to a name including ***"storm"***
- **Wolverine's Claws:** Rename a *diamond / netherite sword / axe* to a name including ***"claw"***
- **Thunderbolt:** Rename a *diamond / netherite sword / axe / pickaxe* to a name including ***"thunderbolt"***

## Contents & renames in V4 (and onwards):

- **Captain America's Shield:** Rename a *shield* to a name including ***"cap"***
- **Mjolnir (512x, reimagined by Szombie):** Rename an *iron / diamond / netherite sword / axe / pickaxe* to a name including ***"Mjolnir, the Mighty Hammer"***
- **Thor Odinson's Mjolnir:** Rename an *iron / diamond / netherite sword / axe / pickaxe* to a name including ***"Thor Odinson's Mjolnir"***
- **Mighty Thor's Mjolnir:** Rename an *iron / diamond / netherite sword / axe / pickaxe* to a name including ***"Mighty Thor's Mjolnir"***
- **Stormbreaker:** Rename an *iron / diamond / netherite sword / axe / pickaxe* to a name including ***"Stormbreaker"***
- **Wolverine's Claws:** Rename an *iron / diamond / netherite sword / axe / pickaxe* to a name including ***"Wolverine's Claw"***
- **Thunderbolt:** Rename an *iron / diamond / netherite sword / axe / pickaxe* to a name including ***"Thunderbolt"***

### Requirements: OptiFine 1.13+ or OptiFabric with working OptiFine 1.13+ or CIT mod.

Installation & Check your settings
- Move the ".zip" file to the "...\.minecraft\resourcepacks\" folder. In the game, activate the resource pack and you're good to go!
- In Options -> Video Settings -> Quality, set the Custom Items to "On" in order for the resource pack to work properly!

## THANK YOU!

If you would like to **support** me, please consider **subscribing** to my **YouTube** channel! You also have the option to **donate** me on **PayPal** as well.
 
### I really hope you'll enjoy the resource pack! Have fun!
